title: Respiratory Pathogens Panel: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
vailable from: https://testdirectory.questdiagnostics.com/test/test-detail/31687/sars-cov-2-rna-covid-19-and-respiratory-pathogen-panel-qualitative-naat?q=31687&cc=MASTER

Diagnostics (Basel). 2023 Jun 9;13(12):2014. [cited 2024 Mar 14]. [about 14 screens]. doi: 10.3390/diagnostics13122014. PMID: 37370910; PMCID: PMC10297358.
